hero.subtitle: Expert manufacturing of <gold>gold, silver, and palladium</gold> products. <custom>Custom bar fabrication</custom>, uncompromising purity, and <qr>QR-verified authenticity</qr>, redefining trust in precious metals.

chainOfCustody.label: Chain-of-Custody
chainOfCustody.title: Ledger-locked traceability
chainOfCustody.body: Every gram is recorded with encrypted QR seals and mirrored audit trails.

purityLab.label: Purity Lab
purityLab.title: Spectrometry-backed assurance
purityLab.body: In-house molecular testing calibrates bullion batches to bespoke tolerances.

globalTrust.label: Global Trust
globalTrust.title: ISO 9001
globalTrust.body: Audited facilities, transparent compliance, concierge-level documentation.

qrCard.label: Scan & Verify
qrCard.title: Tap to launch Silver King QR scanner
qrCard.description: Capture the QR seal to view purity & provenance. "Product authenticated" badge appears once functionality is live.

journalTeaser.title: Journal
journalTeaser.description: News, insights, and stories from Silver King — industry updates and behind-the-scenes perspectives.

whatWeDo.title: Craft from raw bullion
whatWeDo.description: We transform responsibly sourced gold, silver, and palladium into investment-grade bars using tightly controlled refining and casting lines.

hero.title: Engineering the lifecycle
hero.subtitle: From ore selection and purification to serial coding, QR sealing, and verification, we choreograph each step so every bar carries a verifiable story of origin and custody.

card1.label: Gold fabrication lines
card1.caption: High‑throughput casting, edge finishing, and surface treatment tuned for bullion batches.

card2.title: Engineer authenticity into every bar
card2.description: Each piece is born with a unique serial, lab-backed purity data, and encrypted QR that ties physical metal to its digital identity.
card2.label: Silver & palladium refinement
card2.caption: Spectrometry‑backed purification with ISO‑aligned quality controls for industrial and retail bars.

card3.title: Scale verified precious metal flows
card3.description: From mint to vault to client, telemetry and scan events keep partners aligned on provenance, custody, and lifecycle events.
card3.label: Digital verification stack
card3.caption: QR issuance, scan logging, and risk signals wired directly into Silver King Command.

traceable.title: Traceable supply chains
traceable.body: Every Silver King bar carries a verifiable story of origin, custody, and verification events, giving partners confidence in each transfer.

operational.title: Operational clarity
operational.body: Live telemetry from scans turns scattered movements into structured data, helping you see what is moving, where, and through whom.

customer.title: Customer trust at scale
customer.body: A single tap on the QR reveals authenticity, provenance, and product details, building long‑term trust with collectors and institutions.

compliance.title: Compliance‑ready records
compliance.body: Audit‑friendly logs and standardized identifiers simplify reporting across jurisdictions and support stringent regulatory frameworks.

capabilities.title: Our
capabilities.subtitle: Precision engineering meets uncompromising quality standards

fabrication.title: Gold, Silver & Palladium Fabrication
fabrication.description: High-purity bullion manufacturing from 5gr to 500gr. Expert craftsmanship meeting international standards.

purityLab.title: Advanced Purity Lab
purityLab.description: Spectrometry testing ensuring 99.99% quality. ISO 9001 certified facilities with transparent compliance.

security.title: QR-Authenticated Security
security.description: Each bar integrated with unique, encrypted traceability. Blockchain-ready verification system.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.heroDescription: Scan the QR code or enter serial number to verify authenticity and view provenance details
authenticity.enterSerialHint: Enter the serial number found on your Silver King bar

about.title: About Us
about.description: Learn more about Silver King by CAI.

hero.title: The Legacy
hero.subtitle: Crafting excellence in precious metals since 2024 with uncompromising precision and ground-breaking verification technology.

whyChoose.title: Why Choose
whyChoose.subtitle: Experience the pinnacle of precious metal authentication with a heritage of trust and modern innovation.

authenticity.title: Verified Authenticity
authenticity.description: Each product comes with a unique QR code for instant verification and authenticity confirmation.

quality.title: Premium Quality
quality.description: 99.99% purity guarantee on all our precious metal products, crafted with meticulous attention to detail.

craftsmanship.title: Luxury Craftsmanship
craftsmanship.description: Custom designs and precision manufacturing make every piece a work of art worthy of your collection.

howItWorks.title: Simple. Secure.
howItWorks.subtitle: Three effortless steps to authenticate your investment with confidence.

step1.title: Scan QR Code
step1.description: Simply scan the unique QR code on your product using your smartphone camera.

step2.title: Instant Verification
step2.description: Our system instantly verifies the product's authenticity and displays detailed information.

step3.title: Guaranteed Authentic
step3.description: Receive confirmation that your precious metal is 100% genuine and certified.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Silver King by CAI represents the pinnacle of precious metal manufacturing. We specialize in creating luxury gold, silver, palladium, and custom silver bars that embody perfection in every detail.
story.paragraph2: Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every product we create. With a purity guarantee of 99.99% on all our precious metals, we ensure that each piece meets the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.
story.paragraph3: Every Silver King product comes with a unique QR code verification system, allowing our customers to instantly verify the authenticity of their investment. This innovative approach combines traditional craftsmanship with modern technology.

certificate.title: Company
certificate.subtitle: Our commitment to excellence is validated by international quality standards
certificate.certificateName: ISO 9001:2015 Certificate - PT Cahaya Abu Indonesia
certificate.clickToView: Click image to view certificate details

description.title: International Quality Assurance
description.paragraph1: PT Cahaya Abu Indonesia proudly holds ISO 9001:2015 certification, demonstrating our unwavering commitment to quality management systems and operational excellence in precious metals manufacturing.
description.paragraph2: This internationally recognized certification validates our rigorous quality control processes, ensuring that every Silver King product meets the highest standards of purity, precision, and authenticity.
description.paragraph3: Our ISO 9001:2015 certification covers the complete manufacturing process of precious metals, from raw material sourcing to final product verification, providing our customers with confidence in every bar they invest in.

certificate.imageLoadError: Could not load the certificate image. Upload it to R2 as static/images/sertificate.jpeg (or certificate.jpeg), add it under public/images/, or set NEXT_PUBLIC_ABOUT_CERTIFICATE_IMAGE_URL.

cta.title: Ready to verify
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of satisfied customers who trust Silver King for authentic, verified precious metals.

hero.title: Our Official Distributors
hero.subtitle: Find our official distributors in various cities for authentic products and the best service.

distributor.description: We work with official distributors in various cities to ensure product availability, service quality, and ease of transaction for customers. Every listed distributor is a trusted partner that has gone through a verification process.
distributor.listSubtitle: Our official partners are ready to serve you in your city.

form.quantityInfoSingle: Single product. Enter serial prefix (e.g., SKT) to auto-generate SKT000001 format.

serticard.title: Serticard templates
serticard.description: Manage the custom pair, CMS spreads, and QR Preview labels — upload, rename, or remove.
serticard.configLoadErrorInline: Could not load serticard configuration. Please refresh the page.
serticard.sectionUploadSubtitle: Used when ✨ Custom is selected in QR Preview. Upload front and back; replace or delete each side independently.
serticard.frontHint: Left PDF panel: we overlay the scan QR, product name, and serial on your art—no static QR or serial in the file. PNG/JPEG. Custom option needs both front and back uploaded.
serticard.backHint: Right PDF panel: back-of-card design, no QR. Root key (if any) appears as small text bottom-left—keep important artwork out of that corner.
serticard.uploadFrontOk: Front uploaded. Add the back file to enable Custom.
serticard.uploadBackOk: Back uploaded. Add the front file to enable Custom.
serticard.deleteFrontConfirm: Delete the front template file from storage? You can upload again anytime.
serticard.deleteBackConfirm: Delete the back template file from storage? You can upload again anytime.
serticard.deleteAllConfirm: Delete both custom files from cloud storage, clear the QR Preview display name, and revert to built-in templates?
serticard.resetHint: Removes both files from R2 and clears the Custom dropdown label. CMS spreads (list below) are not removed.
serticard.cmsSectionLead: Wide spreads (QR panel left, back right) listed here; each appears in QR Preview as cms:…. Add from the + button, then rename or remove from the table.
serticard.cmsEmptySubtitle: Create one to show it in the QR Preview template list as cms:….
serticard.cmsUploadNameHelp: Shown in the list and dropdown. If empty, a default name is used.
serticard.cmsListFailedToast: Failed to load CMS template list
serticard.cmsDeleteConfirm: Remove template "{name}"? The cloud file will be deleted too.
serticard.resetTemplatesToast: Custom templates removed. QR Preview falls back to built-in variants.
serticard.sectionAppearanceLead: Optional. Replaces the “Custom” label in the template dropdown when both files exist.
serticard.templateNameHelp: Leave empty to use the default label.
serticard.saveFooterHint: Only this name needs saving here. Image uploads are already live.

qrPreviewDetail.title: Every serialized artifact
qrPreviewDetail.description: High-fidelity QR assets, ready to scan.
qrPreviewDetail.searchPlaceholder: Search by product name or serial...
qrPreviewDetail.downloadSelectedFailed: Please select at least one QR code to download.
qrPreviewDetail.downloadSuccess: Successfully downloaded PNG with {count} QR code(s)!
qrPreviewDetail.downloadSelectedSuccess: Successfully downloaded PNG with {count} selected QR code(s)!
qrPreviewDetail.zipVerificationSummary: Server verification: {verified} PDFs passed buffer checks · {warnings} warnings · {failed} not added (failed checks). Open SERTICARD-ZIP-VERIFICATION.json inside each ZIP for details.

zipIssues.title: ZIP download verification log
zipIssues.lead: Products that failed PDF buffer checks or were filtered out before render are listed here. You can retry a single PDF (same flow as single download) or dismiss a row after it is handled.
zipIssues.bannerTitle: {count, plural, one {There is # open ZIP issue} other {There are # open ZIP issues}}
zipIssues.bannerLead: Some PDFs may be missing from ZIPs after server verification. Review the list and retry downloads if needed.
zipIssues.retryInvalid: Row data is not sufficient for PDF download (invalid name or serial).
zipIssues.retryDisabledHint: Fix product data in inventory, then try again from QR Preview.

journal.title: Journal
journal.listDescription: Manage bilingual stories, dates, and what visitors see on the public journal.
journal.emptySubtitle: Create your first article to show it on the website journal.
journal.publicUrlHint: The web address is created from the English title when you first publish. Later edits keep the same link so bookmarks keep working.
journal.articleDateHint: Shown on the public journal and article pages. Newer dates appear first in lists; older posts sort lower. You can set this separately from when the post goes live.
journal.bodyNoInlineImages: Use the hero image above for photos. The editor supports headings, lists, links, and quotes only.
journal.heroImageHelp: One image per article. Each upload is optimized on the server (WebP, high quality, smaller file size).
journal.formDescriptionEdit: Update titles, hero image, schedule, and both language versions. Changes apply to the live site when published.
journal.formDescriptionNew: Draft a bilingual article, set the display date, add one hero image, then publish when ready.
journal.sectionSetupHint: URL, schedule, visibility, and hero image. Content in each language is on the steps below.
journal.contentWizardHintId: Write the Indonesian title, excerpt, and body. Use the arrow to switch to English.
journal.contentWizardHintEn: Write the English title, excerpt, and body. When finished, scroll down to save or cancel.
journal.actionsFooterHint: Submit only when you have reviewed both language versions and publishing settings above.
